commit.subject: LU-1823 kernel: Enable tons of kernel debug options
commit.message:
LU-1823 kernel: Enable tons of kernel debug options

Enable extra debugging options in rhel6 and rhel7 kernels
to see how that works in Maloo testing and for future
use in other tests.

This is NOT FOR LANDING YET.
